Psionic Presence.name: Psionic Presence
Psionic Presence.description: All Weapons of Friendly Units targeting an Enemy Unit Within 4" of this Unit’s Shade token gain PRECISION (1).

Psionic Transfer.name: Psionic Transfer
Psionic Transfer.description: Set a Shade token Wholly Within 12" of any model in this Unit. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may set all models of this Unit in Coherency, treating the Shade token as the Leading Model. The Shade token has DISPLACEMENT.

Glaive Cannon.name: Glaive Cannon
Glaive Cannon.description:
RANGE: 8 | TARGET: All | RoA: 2 | HIT: 3+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: Light (D3+1)

ANTI-EVADE (1)

Resonating Glaives.description: This Unit's Glaive Cannon gains BUFF RoA (1).
Resonating Glaives.name: Resonating Glaives

Guidance.name: Guidance
Guidance.description: This Unit's Glaive Cannon Ranged weapon gains ANTI-EVADE (2).

Commander.description: Treat this Unit’s Supply characteristic as increased by 1 for Controlling and Contesting Mission Markers, completing objectives, and resolving Disengage checks.
Commander.name: Commander

Phase Prism.name: Phase Prism
Phase Prism.description: When Artanis is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve the PLACE (0) effect from another Friendly Unit. That Friendly Unit is removed from the battlefield and returned to Reserves. Artanis' Activation ends.

Hierarch’s Stand.description: When another Friendly Unit Within 8" is declared as the target of a Ranged Attack and this Unit is a valid target, redirect the attack to this Unit. This Unit is eligible to make an Evade Roll against the redirected attack. This Special Ability remains active until the End of the current Activation.
Hierarch’s Stand.name: Hierarch’s Stand

Lightning Dash.name: Lightning Dash
Lightning Dash.description: After this Unit resolves a successful Charge action, it may declare a second Charge action against a different Enemy Unit, ignoring the restriction on Charging while Engaged. The Devastating Charge ability does not trigger a second time.

Devastating Charge.name: Devastating Charge
Devastating Charge.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the IMPACT (6) 4+ effect.

Twilight Blades Strike.description:
RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 2 | HIT: 2+ | DMG: 3
SURGE: Armoured (D3)
Twilight Blades Strike.name: Twilight Blades Strike

Shield Overcharge.description: This Unit gains TOUGH (2) on the first Armour Roll each Round.
Shield Overcharge.name: Shield Overcharge

Leg Enhancements.name: Leg Enhancements
Leg Enhancements.description: This Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.

Charge.name: Charge
Charge.description: When determining Charge Distance for this Unit, roll 2D6 instead of D6 and use the higher result to add to the Unit’s Speed characteristic.

Devastating Charge.name: Devastating Charge
Devastating Charge.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the IMPACT (3) 4+ effect.

Psi Blades.name: Psi Blades

RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 4 | HIT: 3+ | DMG: 1

Titan Killers.description: When this Unit makes a Close Combat Attack, and the target is Size 3 or larger, the weapon’s Damage characteristic is treated as 2.
Titan Killers.name: Titan Killers

Precognition.description: This Unit is eligible to make an Evade roll against all attacks targeting it.
Precognition.name: Precognition

Structure.name: Structure
Structure.description: This Unit cannot be Activated in any Phase and cannot perform actions. Additionally, its Current Supply Value is treated as 0, and it can never Control or Contest Mission Markers, ignoring the standard Zero Supply Exception. This Unit cannot be a target of an ability, unless stated otherwise.

Khalai Ingenuity.name: Khalai Ingenuity
Khalai Ingenuity.description: Once per Round, when a Friendly Unit Within 4" of this Pylon uses a Special Ability that costs Psionic Energy, that ability’s PE cost is reduced by 1.

Warp Conduit.description: Once per Round, the controlling player may deploy a Ground Unit from Reserves using this Pylon base as the Entry Edge. This Unit's Activation ends.
Warp Conduit.name: Warp Conduit

Restoration.name: Restoration
Restoration.description: Use when a Friendly Unit Within 4" receives a DEBUFF. Remove all DEBUFFS from it.

Force Field.description: Set a Force Field token Within 8" in an unoccupied space. Units of Size 2 or lower cannot move across Force Fields. Models of Size 3 or more can move over it, and it's then removed.
Force Field.name: Force Field

Guardian Shield.description: All Ranged Attacks targeting a Friendly Unit Within 4" (Line of Sight is not required) are made with 1 fewer die in the Attack Pool.
Guardian Shield.name: Guardian Shield

Solid-Field Projectors.description: Set a Force Field token Within 8" in an unoccupied space. Units of Size 2 or lower cannot move across Force Fields. Models of Size 3 or more can move over it, and it's then removed.

Omega Network.description:
The base of the Omega Worm counts as an Entry Edge. Each Round, Friendly Units with a combined Supply cost of 2 or less may be Deployed via this Entry Edge.

If a Friendly Leading model finishes a Move, Disengage, or Run action in base-to-base contact with the Omega Worm, the controlling player may remove that Unit from the battlefield and return it to Reserves.

SURGE: Light (D3)
C-14 rifle.name: C-14 rifle

SURGE: Armoured (D3)

LONG RANGE (18"), SPECIALIST
AGG-12.name: AGG-12

Rocket Launcher.name: Rocket Launcher
Rocket Launcher.description:
RANGE: 12 | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 4 | HIT: 3+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: -

INDIRECT FIRE, LONG RANGE (18"), SIDEARM, SPECIALIST

Slugthrower.name: Slugthrower
Slugthrower.description: When this Unit makes a Ranged Attack with a C-14 Rifle and the target is Within 8", that weapon gains ANTI-EVADE (1).

Grenades - Frag.name: Grenades - Frag
Grenades - Frag.description: When this Unit makes a Ranged Attack with a C-14 Rifle and the target is Within 8", that weapon’s S Dice is replaced by D6.

Strike.description:
RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 1 | HIT: 5+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: -
Strike.name: Strike

Bayonet.name: Bayonet
Bayonet.description:
RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 2 | HIT: 5+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: -

Life Support.name: Life Support
Life Support.description: Use when another Friendly Biological Unit suffers Damage Within 4". Reduce the Total Damage before allocation by 1 for each model in this Unit that is Within 4" of the damaged Unit.

Advanced Medic Facilities.description: This Unit’s Supply Value counts as 0 when calculating the Supply Pool.
Advanced Medic Facilities.name: Advanced Medic Facilities

Restoration.description: Use when a Friendly Unit Within 4" receives a DEBUFF. Remove all DEBUFFS from it.
Restoration.name: Restoration

A-13 Flash Grenade Launcher.description: Increase the Optical Flare special ability's Range to 16".
A-13 Flash Grenade Launcher.name: A-13 Flash Grenade Launcher

Stabilizer Medpacks.name: Stabilizer Medpacks
Stabilizer Medpacks.description: When this Unit resolves a Life Support or Medpack ability, treat it as having 1 additional model Within Range for calculating that ability's effects.

Medpack.description: Select another Friendly Biological Unit Within 4". Resolve the HEAL (X) effect for the targeted Unit, where X is the number of models in this Unit that are Within 4" of the target Unit.
Medpack.name: Medpack

Optical Flare.name: Optical Flare
Optical Flare.description: Select one Enemy Unit Within 12". Until the End of the Round, apply DEBUFF Range (4) to that Unit’s Ranged Weapons. That Unit cannot benefit from LONG RANGE.

Strike.name: Strike
Strike.description:
RANGE: E | TARGET: Ground | RoA: 1 | HIT: 5+ | DMG: 1
SURGE: -

Point Defense Laser.description: When another Friendly Unit Within 4" is targeted by a Ranged Attack without the INSTANT keyword, remove up to 2 dice from the Attack Pool. Then remove this Unit from the battlefield.
Point Defense Laser.name: Point Defense Laser

Structure.description: This Unit cannot be Activated in any Phase and cannot perform actions. Additionally, its Current Supply Value is treated as 0, and it can never Control or Contest Mission Markers, ignoring the standard Zero Supply Exception. This Unit cannot be a target of an ability, unless stated otherwise.
Structure.name: Structure

Stimpack.name: Stimpack
Stimpack.description: This Unit suffers NON-LETHAL DAMAGE (2). This Unit gains BUFF Speed (3). Additionally, its C-14 Rifle and all Close Combat Weapons gain PRECISION (3).

Raiders Roll!.name: Raiders Roll!
Raiders Roll!.description: When this Unit is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve its Stimpack ability with the CP cost reduced by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

Rapid Reinforcements.name: Rapid Reinforcements
Rapid Reinforcements.description: When this Unit is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve the PLACE (10) effect from another Friendly Unit. No model may be set Within 8" of any Enemy model. This Unit's Activation ends.
